channel.title: Journal für die reine und angewandte Mathematik
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal für die reine und angewandte Mathematik

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Johannes Anschütz, Ben Heuer, Arthur-César Le Bras DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2025-frontmatter820

item.title: Covariant projective representations of Hilbert–Lie groups

item.title: Solutions of the minimal surface equation and of the Monge–Ampère equation near infinity
item.description: Article by Johannes Anschütz, Ben Heuer, Arthur-César Le Bras DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0091

item.title: A Lindemann–Weierstrass theorem for 𝐸-functions
item.description: Article by Johannes Anschütz, Ben Heuer, Arthur-César Le Bras DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0090

item.title: Topology and dynamics of compact plane waves
item.description: Article by Johannes Anschütz, Ben Heuer, Arthur-César Le Bras DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0095

item.title: Diameter of Kähler currents
item.description: Article by Johannes Anschütz, Ben Heuer, Arthur-César Le Bras DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0092

item.title: CscK metrics near the canonical class
item.description: Article by Johannes Anschütz, Ben Heuer, Arthur-César Le Bras DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0096

item.title: On 3-nondegenerate CR manifolds in dimension 7 (I): The transitive case
item.description: Article by Johannes Anschütz, Ben Heuer, Arthur-César Le Bras DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0093

item.title: The rigidity of eigenvalues on Kähler manifolds with positive Ricci lower bound
item.description: Article by Johannes Anschütz, Ben Heuer, Arthur-César Le Bras DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0101

item.title: Hodge–Tate stacks and non-abelian 𝑝-adic Hodge theory of v-perfect complexes on rigid spaces
item.description: Article by Johannes Anschütz, Ben Heuer, Arthur-César Le Bras DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2024-0097
